MeasurementToolMetadata.Description: Wolf Post-scan Questionnaire - Memory task (not scored)
MeasurementToolMetadata.LongName: Three post-scan self-report items about the memory task, each rated 1-7. No summary score.

wolf_post_1.Description: How interested were you? Please click the number that best describes your experience.

wolf_post_2.Description: How hard did you try to give the right answers? Please click the number that best describes your experience.

wolf_post_3.Description: How happy did you feel when you thought you gave the right answer? Please click the number that best describes your experience.
